stories.headline: Zendaya Shows Off Wedding Band After Tom Holland Confirms Marriage - E! News
stories.summary: After Tom Holland confirmed that he and Zendaya were, in fact, married, the Euphoria actress put her wedding band on full display at the Spider-Man: Brand New Day photocall in Amsterdam.

stories.headline: Duffer Brothers’ Series ‘The Boroughs’ Canceled By Netflix After One Season - Deadline
stories.summary: Netflix has canceled the Duffer Brothers' latest show, 'The Boroughs,' after one season.

stories.headline: Olivia Wilde Clears Her Name - Vulture
stories.summary: Olivia Wilde is promoting ‘The Invite,’ her first movie as director since the PR disaster surrounding ‘Don’t Worry Darling.’ She’s ready to talk about (most of) it.

stories.headline: Howie Mandel had bugs living under his skin as a kid. He still lives with the trauma - USA Today
stories.summary: Howie Mandel had a rare skin condition as a kid. The way doctors treated him, he said, gave him lasting trauma − and he's not alone.

stories.headline: ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ Trailer Gives First Look At Mark Ruffalo’s Hulk - Deadline
stories.summary: Sony Pictures just released a new trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day, which includes a first look at Mark Ruffalo's reprisal of the Hulk.

stories.headline: ‘The Proud Family: Louder And Prouder’ To End With Season 4; Premiere Date & New Holiday Special Set - Deadline
stories.summary: Disney+ has confirmed that Season 4 will be the last for The Proud Family: Louder and Prouder, set to premiere July 29.

stories.headline: Jelly Roll and Bunnie Xo had tumultuous marriage long before divorce - USA Today
stories.summary: Bunnie Xo praised her husband Jelly Roll, in her memoir months ago, but also wrote of the infidelity and arguments they had to work through.

stories.headline: Olivia Wilde on “Traumatizing” CinemaCon Moment and What Tom Cruise Said About It - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: The actress and filmmaker sat for a lengthy conversation with Alex Cooper on her SiriusXM series ‘Call Her Daddy,’ dishing on hitting rock bottom amid ‘Don’t Worry Darling’ to Harry Styles romance.
